Toggle functionalities for airplane mode, motion-activated backlight, and Quiet Time in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[airplane_mode.c](airplane_mode.c.md)**: Implements the airplane mode toggle functionality for the Pebble firmware.
- **[airplane_mode.h](airplane_mode.h.md)**: Header file for managing airplane mode toggle functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[motion_backlight.c](motion_backlight.c.md)**: Implements a toggle for motion-activated backlight in the Pebble firmware.
- **[motion_backlight.h](motion_backlight.h.md)**: Defines the UUID and function to get app info for the motion backlight toggle feature.
- **[quiet_time.c](quiet_time.c.md)**: Implements the Quiet Time toggle functionality with do-not-disturb mode integration.
- **[quiet_time.h](quiet_time.h.md)**: Defines the UUID and function to get app info for the Quiet Time toggle feature.
